content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:HanSoloatStarsEnd-Hardcover.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' released in April 1979.]]
A list of events in '''1979''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 3|03]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 48|''Star Wars Weekly'' 48]] published.
*[[January 10|10]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 49|''Star Wars Weekly'' 49]] published.
*[[January 15|15]] – [[Aubree Miller]] is born.
*[[January 17|17]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 50|''Star Wars Weekly'' 50]] published.
*[[January 23|23]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]] published.
*[[January 24|24]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 51|''Star Wars Weekly'' 51]] published.
*[[January 26|26]] – [[Yoon Ha Lee]] is born.
*[[January 31|31]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 52|''Star Wars Weekly'' 52]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 16]] ''is published.
*?? – [[Pizzazz 16|''Pizzazz'' 16]] published.

==February==
*[[February 7|07]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 53|''Star Wars Weekly'' 53]] published.
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Josh Keaton]] is born.
*[[February 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 54|''Star Wars Weekly'' 54]] published.
*[[February 19|19]] – [[Brendan Hay]] is born.
*[[February 20|20]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 23|''Star Wars'' (1977) 23]] published.
*[[February 23|23]] – [[Brian Albert Thies]] is born.
*[[February 26|26]] – [[Veronica Ngo]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 17]]'' is published.

==March==
*[[March 9|09]] – [[Oscar Isaac]] is born.
*[[March 11|11]] – [[The Constancia Affair]] serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]], launching the Star Wars newspaper strips.
*[[March 12|12]] – ''[[Gambler's World]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*12 – ''[[The Maverick Moon]]'' published.
*12 – ''[[The Mystery of the Rebellious Robot]]'' published.
*12 – ''[[The Star Wars Question and Answer Book About Space]]'' released.
*[[March 14|14]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 55|''Star Wars Weekly'' 55]] published.
*[[March 21|21]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 56|''Star Wars Weekly'' 56]] published.
*[[March 27|27]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 24|''Star Wars'' (1977) 24]] published.
*[[March 28|28]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 57|''Star Wars Weekly'' 57]] published.
*[[March 30|30]] – [[Pete Holmes]] is born.
*?? – [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 18|''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 18]] is published.

==April==
*[[April 4|04]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 58|''Star Wars Weekly'' 58]] published.
*[[April 9|09]] – [[Brandon Badeaux]] is born.
*[[April 11|11]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 59|''Star Wars Weekly'' 59]] published.
*[[April 12|12]] – ''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' published.
*[[April 18|18]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 60|''Star Wars Weekly'' 60]] published.
*[[April 23|23]] – [[Jaime King]] is born.
*[[April 24|24]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 25|''Star Wars'' (1977) 25]] published.
*[[April 25|25]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 61|''Star Wars Weekly'' 61]] published.

==May==
*[[May 2|02]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 62|''Star Wars Weekly'' 62]] published.
*[[May 9|09]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 63|''Star Wars Weekly'' 63]] published.
*[[May 16|16]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 64|''Star Wars Weekly'' 64]] published.
*[[May 19|19]] – [[Caroline de Souza Correa]] is born.
*[[May 22|22]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 26|''Star Wars'' (1977) 26]] published.
*[[May 23|23]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 65|''Star Wars Weekly'' 65]] published.
*23 – ''[[Star Friends]]'' PSA released.
*[[May 29|29]] – [[Abel G. Peña]] is born.
*[[May 30|30]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 66|''Star Wars Weekly'' 66]] published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – [[John Barry]] dies.
*[[June 6|06]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 67|''Star Wars Weekly'' 67]] published.
*[[June 11|11]] – [[John Wayne]] dies.
*[[June 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 68|''Star Wars Weekly'' 68]] published.
*[[June 15|15]] – [[Leanne Best]] is born.
*[[June 20|20]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 69|''Star Wars Weekly'' 69]] published.
*[[June 25|25]] – [[Nathan Hamill]] is born.
*[[June 26|26]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 27|''Star Wars'' (1977) 27]] published.
*[[June 27|27]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 70|''Star Wars Weekly'' 70]] published.
*?? – ''[[Famous Spaceships of Fact and Fantasy]]'' published.
*?? – [[Dominic Sikking]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 4|04]] – [[Kevin Thoms]] is born.
*04 – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 71]] ''published.
*[[July 11|11]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 72]] ''published.
*[[July 12|12]] – [[Omid Abtahi]] is born.
*[[July 15|15]] – ''[[The Kashyyyk Depths]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[July 18|18]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 73]] ''published.
*[[July 24|24]] – [[Rose Byrne]] is born.
*24 – [[Star Wars (1977) 28|''Star Wars'' (1977) 28]] published.
*[[July 25|25]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 74]] ''published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 75|''Star Wars Weekly'' 75]] published.
*[[August 7|07]] – [[Nishan Hindes]] & [[Nifa Hindes]] are born.
*[[August 8|08]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 76]] ''published.
*[[August 9|09]] – [[Michael Kingma]] is born.
*[[August 10|10]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] (re-issue)
*[[August 14|14]] – [[Zack Whedon]] is born.
*[[August 15|15]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 77]] ''published.
*[[August 22|22]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 78]] ''published.
*[[August 23|23]] – [[Clare Grant]] is born.
*[[August 28|28]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 29|''Star Wars'' (1977) 29]] is published.
*[[August 29|29]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 79]] ''published.

==September==
*[[September 5|05]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 80]] ''published.
*[[September 10|10]] – ''[[Tatooine Sojourn]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[September 12|12]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 81]] ''published.
*[[September 19|19]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 82]] ''published.
*[[September 24|24]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''The Empire Strikes Back'']] finishes.
*[[September 25|25]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 30|''Star Wars'' (1977) 30]] published.
*[[September 26|26]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 83]] ''published.
*[[September 30|30]] – [[Jon Kasdan]] is born.

==October==
*[[October 3|03]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 84]] ''published.
*[[October 4|04]] – [[Rachael Leigh Cook]] is born.
*[[October 10|10]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 85]] ''published.
*[[October 12|12]] – ''[[Han Solo's Revenge]]'' published.
*[[October 15|15]] – [[Jeff Moon]] dies.
*[[October 17|17]] – [[Nathan Butler]] is born.
*17 – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 86]] ''published.
*[[October 23|23]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 31|''Star Wars'' (1977) 31]] published.
*[[October 24|24]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 87]] ''published.
*[[October 27|27]] – [[Mat Lucas]] is born.
*[[October 30|30]] – [[Graham Ashley]] dies.
*[[October 31|31]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 88]] ''published.
*?? – ''[[The Wookiee Storybook]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – [[The Art of Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope|''The Art of Star Wars'']] published.
*[[November 6|06]] – ''[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]] ''serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[November 7|07]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 89]] ''published.
*[[November 13|13]] – [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]] published.
*[[November 14|14]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 90]] ''published.
*[[November 21|21]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 91]] ''published.
*[[November 22|22]] – [[Leeanna Walsman]] is born.
*[[November 27|27]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 32|''Star Wars'' (1977) 32]] published.
*[[November 28|28]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 92]] ''published.
*[[November 29|29]] – [[Liz Wilson]] is born.

==December==
*[[December 5|05]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 93]] ''published.
*[[December 7|07]] – [[Eric Bauza]] is born.
*[[December 12|12]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 94]] ''published.
*[[December 18|18]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 95]] ''published.
*18 – [[Emily Swallow]] is born.
*[[December 25|25]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 33|''Star Wars'' (1977) 33]] published.
*[[December 26|26]] – ''[[Star Wars Weekly 96]] ''published.
*[[December 29|29]] – [[Diego Luna]] is born.
*[[December 30|30]] – [[Catherine Taber]] is born.

==Unknown==
*[[Babou Ceesay]] is born.
*[[Jonathan Harden]] is born.

==Miscellaneous==
*[[Kenner Products|Kenner]] releases the following action figures:
**[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]
**[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]
**[[R5-D4/Legends|R5-D4]]
**[[Power droid/Legends|Power droid]]
**[[3B6-RA-7]] aka '[[RA-7 protocol droid/Legends|Death Star Droid]]'
**[[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] aka Walrus Man
**[[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]] aka [[Harbinger (Hammerhead-class)|Hammerhead]]
**[[Greedo/Legends|Greedo]]
**Snaggletooth aka [[Zutmore]]
**Blue Snaggletooth aka [[Zutton/Legends|Zutton]]

----
